metadata.description: DC Regional Contacts - Organized by Distribution Center
metadata.purpose: Central list of all DC recipients - update here, system uses automatically

instructions.how_to_use: Add DC contacts here. When ready, run: python manage_paycycle.py add-recipient production email@walmart.com 'Name' 'Title'
instructions.by_region: Organize by region/DC name for easy reference
instructions.format: Email, Full Name, Title, Region, Notes

quick_reference.purpose: When you're ready, this is what you'll give us
quick_reference.example: You'll say: 'Here are the DC contacts by region, add these to production'

implementation_workflow.step1: You provide: DC contacts by region (names, emails, titles)
implementation_workflow.step2: I add them to production: python manage_paycycle.py add-recipient production email@walmart.com 'Name' 'DC Title'
implementation_workflow.step3: You switch to production: python manage_paycycle.py switch-mode production
implementation_workflow.step4: System sends to all DC contacts on next PayCycle

summary.when_ready: Just let me know you have the DC contacts
summary.what_to_provide: List of: Name, Email, Title, DC/Region
summary.what_i_will_do: Add them all to production and switch system over
summary.no_disruption: Test mode remains active until you approve switch
